film.title: Chalo Dilli
film.overview: Mihika, an investment banker, misses her flight to Delhi and meets Manu Gupta, a very talkative man. In order to reach Delhi on time, she must tag along with him on a road trip and put up with his antics.

dialogues.dialogue: Vibha could make the witches look kind! You don't know her. Aren't you ashamed? You are mocking your wife publicly. I am mocking my own wife and not his.

The riots have ended a long time ago. You civilians really are..We fight the enemies at the border.....and you fight amongst yourselves. You civilians should be ashamed. You don't have any sense. Let's go.
How sure? 100 percent. You are a shameless woman. There's a guest at Home who has come for the first time.....and you didn't even ask her for water. She has grown lazy.
It's quite high. - High and safe. Isn't that so, Dharampal? This vehicle has the pride of a king, isn't that true? Rules over the roads There goes a tiny tempo..And there goes that ant sized scooter
